name: Detection of Turla Hash IOC in Events
notes:
This rule triggers when an IOC is recognized as a Turla hash.

Note: The rules Malware as a Service Hash IOC in Events, Ransomware: Ryuk IOC in Events have been excluded from this rule to avoid repetition, their purpose is to have a dedicated rule response.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System
when an event matches any of the following Malware as a Service Hash IOC in Events, Ransomware: Ryuk IOC in Events
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, System.File Created, System.File Deleted, Audit.Object Load Success
when the event matches "SHA256 Hash" is not null or "MD5 Hash" is not null or "SHA1 Hash" is not null AQL filter query

when the event matches REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Turla SHA Hashes', "SHA256 Hash") or REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Turla MD5 Hashes', "MD5 Hash") or REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Turla SHA Hashes', "SHA1 Hash") AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Detection of Turla Hash IOC in Events on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System
AND NOT when an event matches any of the following Malware as a Service Hash IOC in Events, Ransomware: Ryuk IOC in Events
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, System.File Created, System.File Deleted, Audit.Object Load Success
AND when the event matches "SHA256 Hash" is not null or  "MD5 Hash" is not null or "SHA1 Hash" is not null AQL filter query

AND when the event matches REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Turla SHA Hashes', "SHA256 Hash") or REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Turla MD5 Hashes', "MD5 Hash") or  REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Turla SHA Hashes', "SHA1 Hash") AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Detection of Turla Hash IOC in Events
Event description: Detects when an IOC is recognized as a Turla hash.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Machine Identifier (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
